source_pr.title: timer: Add more tests for 'takeSession' and 'runInTxn' in timer table store
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #45527

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: The PR mainly adds more tests for timer table store helpers; the case does not include a concrete flaky failure signature beyond enabling the race detector for the Bazel target (`race = "on"`).
failure_signature: No concrete failure signature captured (PR adds tests; only Bazel `race = "on"` signal).
root_cause_explanation: The patch adds test coverage for timer table store helpers and enables running the Bazel target under the race detector. Without a captured flaky signature or a targeted stabilization tied to a flaky mechanism, classify as insufficient evidence rather than guessing a confirmed concurrency/data-race root cause.
fix_pattern: Add tests and enable running the Bazel target under the race detector; no specific flaky root cause is evidenced in the case.
analysis:
PR title: timer: Add more tests for 'takeSession' and 'runInTxn' in timer table store
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/45528
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (3): timer/tablestore/BUILD.bazel, timer/tablestore/sql_test.go, timer/tablestore/store.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
